## Validation

- [ ] Architecture boundaries remain explicit and framework glue has not leaked into domain or application logic
- [ ] Repository-facing documentation affected by this change is updated in English
- [ ] Build, compile, lint, and platform validation are green where applicable
- [ ] Automated tests are green
- [ ] Coverage instrumentation and thresholds remain explicit for the active mobile toolchain when applicable
- [ ] Required CI workflows remain blocking, not advisory
- [ ] Non-applicability of the centralized automatic `stg` runtime deployment chain remains documented
- [ ] Cross-repository contract, SDK, or release implications are documented when affected
